bonusTasks.claudePrompt: I am a PM at a B2C fintech app in India. My backlog has these four items: (1) Loan EMI reminder push notification requested by 300 support tickets, (2) Dark mode requested by 1200 users in App Store reviews, (3) UPI Lite integration demanded by the CEO for a partnership, (4) Fraud detection improvement flagged by the security team as urgent. Help me prioritise these using RICE scoring and explain the trade-offs I am making.
